contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 20
- Description: White-label Phase 2 handoff registered to the nelanco-claude box
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/668
  
  Details:
  Handed off white-label Phase 2 execution to the nelanco-claude interactive box using the documented handoff protocol.
  
  Registered a row in handoffs/HANDOFF_MANIFEST.md covering what shipped (PR0 committed the previously-untracked implementation; D0 flipped the 90-degree-rotated label spec to portrait 2x4; PR1 repaired registration and the post-payment receipt), what is next (RESUME = PR2: B3 stale shipping weight, B4 gallery sort, B5 silent failures) with root causes cited by file and line, the mandatory Playwright verification method, and the decisions that remain Gary's alone.
  
  Corrected the manifest header: it claimed to index handoffs to Sophia only. This row targets a different runner, so the header now states that rows may name another runner explicitly - without that a future reader would assume Sophia owned it and it would sit unclaimed.
  
  Added handoffs/WHITE_LABEL_NELANCO_CLAUDE_KICKOFF.md: Gate D instructions for Gary (only he can run the interactive claude login + /remote-control), a paste-ready first message for the box, PR2's three bugs with file+line, and the verification recipe. The kickoff deliberately leads with what the box must NOT re-derive, so a cold agent does not burn its budget rediscovering what two merged PRs already established.
  
  Surfaced that the handoff is blocked on Gate D per NELANCO_CLAUDE_CODE_BOX_PLAN.md. Gate C is done (47 repos in /opt/claude_workspace, creds laid down, fleet SSH up, HTTPS push working), so the box can open PRs as soon as it has a logged-in session.
  
  Merged: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/668
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
- TDG Issued: 33.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
